title: athyrium regium
intro: Athyrium regium, also known as the Lady Fern or Royal Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the Athyrium genus, characterized by its delicate fronds and distinctive frond shape. Traditionally, Athyrium regium has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Athyrium regium can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
